name: Orchard
description: Rows of little fruit trees — crowns swell through the seasons and trunks stretch a bit taller with every redraw.

code.style: --crownC: @p(var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* the crown sits on the emitted trunk height */ --trunk: @r(16, 34); --crown: @r(36, 64); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 47.5%; bottom: 8%; width: 5%; height: calc(@var(--trunk) * 1%); background: var(--color1); border-radius: 99px; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: calc(@var(--crown) * 1%); left: calc(50% - @var(--crown) * 0.5%); bottom: calc(4% + @var(--trunk) * 1%); border-radius: 50% 50% 46% 46%; background: var(--crownC); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
